user.title: Hapanels
user.description: Connect Hapanels tablets through MQTT. The base topic is the MQTT root used by the Android app and the Home Assistant integration.

set_dashboard_config.name: Set dashboard config
set_dashboard_config.description: Replace the full dashboard configuration for one Hapanels tablet.

config.name: Dashboard config
config.description: Full dashboard configuration object to publish to the tablet.

patch_dashboard_config.name: Patch dashboard config
patch_dashboard_config.description: Apply a revision-based patch to a Hapanels tablet dashboard configuration.

patch.name: Dashboard patch
patch.description: Patch object containing the base revision, update source, and tile/theme/AOD changes.

accept_tablet_config.name: Accept tablet config
accept_tablet_config.description: Resolve a Studio/tablet sync conflict by accepting the tablet's current dashboard configuration.
